description: NexOps audit benchmark registry — research sprint Workstream A

benchmarks.intent: Payroll distributing fixed salary amounts to predetermined employee lockingBytecode destinations. Owner must authorize each payout.
Payroll with recipient binding only; amounts may vary.

benchmarks.notes: Treasury prefunding must NOT become VULNERABILITY; see FP playbook

benchmarks.intent: Payroll without owner signature on distribute path.
Oracle-gated swap; owner signs; oracle UTXO must match oracleLock.
Price feed from off-chain oracle operator; trust deployment.
Swap with unconstrained oracle input index.
Owner-signed swap; minPrice enforced but oracle bytecode not bound.
Stale oracle price accepted without timelock.
Multi-oracle median; partial oracle set accepted.
DAO treasury 2-of-3 multisig with timelock on large withdrawals.
Treasury spend requires council signatures; emergency path timelocked.
DAO payroll from treasury UTXO; external prefunding assumed.
Treasury migration to new covenant without category preservation.
Escrow with embedded timelock refund and hashlock release.
Vault holding NFT mint authority with covenant continuation.
Payroll split with FT token category preservation.
Conditional spend atomic swap with hashlock preimage.
Real-world escrow contract from audit_benchmark_realworld index entry rw_001.
benchmarks.notes: Populate from A.5 index; expected findings set after classification
